name: invinoveritas
_doc: Checks a LIVE published invinoveritas verdict against the three invariants in one no-auth fetch: GET /ledger/{entry}/commitment returns the signed Nostr verdict event (admission + canonical envelope = the recomputable event id) AND the OTS anchor (anchoring). Entry 38 is the first FORWARD pre-outcome anchor (precedence:true), so anchoring flips pending->pass when its Bitcoin block confirms. The committed-sample mapping (invinoveritas.mapping.json) is kept for the offline demo.
